text.title: Mutation Testing Bootstrap Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Mutation Testing Bootstrap end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: pick-tool
step.action: Look up canonical tool: python → mutmut, js/ts → stryker, php → infection, jvm → pitest.

step.name: wire-config
step.action: Drop config skeleton from `templates/`, set `paths_to_mutate` to source dirs, exclude generated + vendored.

step.name: measure-baseline
step.action: Run mutation testing once locally on a representative module; capture survivor rate.
step.decision-gate: If baseline > 50%, STOP — fix tests first via `code-review` and `code-coverage`.

step.name: set-survivor-gate
step.action: Set gate at min(25%, baseline+5%); document ratchet schedule.

step.name: wire-into-ci
step.action: Add CI job: PR-scope mutation on changed files, fail on gate breach, output top-5 survivors as PR comment.
step.decision-gate: If PR job exceeds 10-minute budget, sample or shard.
